/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libautopatrol_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libautopatrol_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/autopatrol_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/autopatrol_interfaces/srv/speech_text__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/scott/chapter8/chapter8_ws/build/autopatrol_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libautopatrol_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
